title: Item created through form doesn’t show creator in creation log
excerpt: I have “require log in” checked in my form and all using my form are part of my workspace, yet every time they submit a request with the form, it populates me as the creator since I created the form. I saw this posted 4 …

posts.author: jholley (jessica.holley@ellucian.com)
posts.cookedHtml: I have “require log in” checked in my form and all using my form are part of my workspace, yet every time they submit a request with the form, it populates me as the creator since I created the form. I saw this posted 4 years ago and it was close, but seems to still be an issue that doesn’t work. Please help.

posts.author: Kkolman (Kristen Kolman)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue here. I am assigned as the “Owner” who submitted the form, but I didn’t submit the request. I am the form creator. We have no way to trace back who submitted the request. Saw the same thread 4 years ago without a resolution. Upvoted your post.
